Located in the scenic Dujiangyan area of Chengdu, the university focuses on disciplines such as computer science, software engineering, digital arts, and business management, aligning with industry demands for technology and innovation. It emphasizes practical, project-based learning through collaborations with Neusoft and other tech companies, offering students internships and real-world experience. The campus features modern facilities, including labs, libraries, and recreational areas, fostering a dynamic academic environment. With a commitment to internationalization, it hosts exchange programs and has a diverse student body. Chengdu Neusoft University aims to cultivate skilled professionals capable of contributing to the global digital economy, supported by a faculty with industry expertise and a vibrant campus life that includes clubs, sports, and cultural activities.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, 0, '2025-10-06T16:16:06.099Z', '2026-01-23T06:02:44.853Z', 'China', '18000.00', '28000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202120/1618896782_6488_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1557722348_3361_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1557722348_3099_thumb.JPG","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1557722348_7716_thumb.JPG","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1557722348_6421_thumb.JPG","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1557722348_5071_thumb.JPG"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'chengdu-neusoft-university', '2026-05-30', '[]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', false, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO universities (id, name_en, name_cn, short_name, logo_url, cover_image_url, province, city, address, website, type, category, ranking_national, ranking_international, founded_year, student_count, international_student_count, faculty_count, teaching_languages, scholarship_available, description, facilities, accommodation_info, contact_email, contact_phone, latitude, longitude, is_active, view_count, created_at, updated_at, country, tuition_min, tuition_max, tuition_currency, images, video_urls, meta_title, meta_description, meta_keywords, og_image, slug, application_deadline, intake_months, default_tuition_per_year, default_tuition_currency, use_default_tuition, scholarship_percentage, tuition_by_degree, scholarship_by_degree, tier, acceptance_flexibility, csca_required, has_application_fee, description_en, description_cn, facilities_en, facilities_cn, accommodation_info_en, accommodation_info_cn, address_en, address_cn) VALUES ('07fecf16-13af-4791-bab6-e84b8a59d432', 'Hubei University of Technology', '湖北工业大学', NULL, 'https://cdn.urongda.com/images/normal/medium/hubei-university-of-technology-logo-1024px.png', 'https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202119/1618823978_7244_thumb.jpg', 'Hubei', 'Wuhan', 'No. 28, Nanli Road, Hongshan District, Wuhan, Hubei Province, China', 'https://www.hbut.edu.cn', 'Regular', NULL, 150, 1250, 1952, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, 'Hubei University of Technology (HBUT), founded in 1952, is a key provincial university in Hubei Province, China, known for its strong emphasis on engineering and technology. Located in Wuhan, the university has evolved into a multidisciplinary institution offering programs in engineering, science, management, economics, arts, and law. HBUT excels in fields such as mechanical engineering, materials science, chemical engineering, and information technology, with notable research in green manufacturing and renewable energy. The university fosters innovation through state key laboratories and engineering research centers, collaborating with industries to address real-world challenges. Campus life is vibrant, featuring modern facilities, student clubs, cultural events, and sports activities, providing a holistic education. With a commitment to applied research and talent development, HBUT contributes significantly to regional economic growth and has built a reputation for producing skilled graduates who thrive in various sectors.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-10-21T06:30:53.437Z', '2025-12-22T19:15:01.911Z', 'China', '18000.00', '30000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202119/1618823978_7244_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201907/1559838713_3861_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201907/1559838713_7585_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201907/1559838712_9336_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201907/1559838712_9832_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201907/1559838712_3145_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'hubei-university-of-technology', '2026-01-30', '[3,9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', false, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It has evolved into a comprehensive university with a strong emphasis on legal education, offering undergraduate, master''s, and doctoral programs. SHUPL is renowned for its programs in law, criminal justice, public administration, and international affairs, with a curriculum designed to meet the demands of modern legal practice and governance. The university fosters a vibrant academic environment, featuring state-of-the-art facilities, including moot courtrooms and legal clinics, and emphasizes practical training through internships and collaborations with legal institutions. Campus life is enriched by diverse student organizations, cultural events, and sports activities, promoting holistic development. SHUPL''s strategic location in Shanghai provides students with ample opportunities for professional networking and career advancement in one of China''s most dynamic cities.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-10-06T16:23:37.266Z', '2026-01-30T21:44:39.473Z', 'China', '18000.00', '28000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552529288_7688_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552529288_4914_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552529288_3019_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552529288_7194_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552529288_1059_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552529288_7224_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552529288_4849_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'shanghai-university-of-political-science-and-law', '2026-05-30', '[]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

The university focuses on applied sciences and technology, with key strengths in engineering, agriculture, and management disciplines. Notable programs include Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science, and Agricultural Science, which are designed to meet regional industrial needs. The campus features modern facilities, including laboratories, libraries, and sports complexes, fostering a vibrant student life with various clubs, cultural events, and internship opportunities. Emphasizing practical education and innovation, the university collaborates with local enterprises to enhance graduate employability, contributing to the economic development of the Shandong region.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-11-21T06:59:58.230Z', '2025-12-22T19:15:01.911Z', 'China', '18000.00', '28000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202121/1618985220_7017_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1560421010_8316_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1560421010_7841_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1560421010_6892_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201913/1560421010_8559_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'weifang-university-of-science-and-technology', '2026-06-21', '[9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', false, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It evolved from the former Chongqing Institute of Technology and has grown into a multidisciplinary institution with strengths in mechanical engineering, materials science, chemical engineering, and information technology. The university offers a range of undergraduate, master''s, and doctoral programs, emphasizing practical skills and innovation. Notable programs include its collaborations with industries in the Chongqing region, such as automotive and manufacturing sectors. Campus life is vibrant, with modern facilities, student clubs, and cultural activities, fostering a dynamic learning environment. CQUST is committed to research and development, contributing to regional economic growth and technological advancement.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-11-20T14:20:04.893Z', '2026-01-13T09:21:49.696Z', 'China', '18000.00', '28000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20240419/1713496897_9985_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1551078733_6382_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202022/1600739770_2722_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1551078733_9309_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1551078733_2282_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1551078733_6247_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'chongqing-university-of-science-and-technology', '2026-05-30', '[9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', false, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It focuses on undergraduate education and has developed strengths in fields such as engineering, management, and liberal arts. Notable programs include Mechanical Engineering, Business Administration, and Chinese Language and Literature, which cater to regional economic and cultural needs. The university emphasizes practical skills and innovation, with modern facilities including laboratories and a library. Campus life is vibrant, featuring student clubs, cultural events, and sports activities, fostering a supportive environment for over 15,000 students. Wuzhou University plays a key role in local development, offering opportunities for international exchanges and community engagement.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-10-09T06:00:50.704Z', '2025-12-22T19:15:01.911Z', 'China', '16000.00', '28000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202021/1590054707_3989_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202120/1618911161_2223_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201921/1553179393_6587_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201921/1553179393_3148_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201921/1553179393_5839_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201921/1553179393_9528_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201921/1553179393_4214_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'wuzhou-university', '2026-05-30', '[3,9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', false, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO universities (id, name_en, name_cn, short_name, logo_url, cover_image_url, province, city, address, website, type, category, ranking_national, ranking_international, founded_year, student_count, international_student_count, faculty_count, teaching_languages, scholarship_available, description, facilities, accommodation_info, contact_email, contact_phone, latitude, longitude, is_active, view_count, created_at, updated_at, country, tuition_min, tuition_max, tuition_currency, images, video_urls, meta_title, meta_description, meta_keywords, og_image, slug, application_deadline, intake_months, default_tuition_per_year, default_tuition_currency, use_default_tuition, scholarship_percentage, tuition_by_degree, scholarship_by_degree, tier, acceptance_flexibility, csca_required, has_application_fee, description_en, description_cn, facilities_en, facilities_cn, accommodation_info_en, accommodation_info_cn, address_en, address_cn) VALUES ('0cf79352-c1ac-479b-8172-07b72d8991cd', 'Hainan University', '海南大学', NULL, 'https://cdn.urongda.com/images/normal/medium/hainan-university-logo-1024px.png', 'https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20250611/1749654353_8859_thumb.jpg', 'Hainan', 'Haikou', '58 Renmin Avenue, Meilan District, Haikou, Hainan Province, China', 'https://www.hainanu.edu.cn', '211', NULL, 120, 1200, 1958, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, 'Hainan University (HNU) is a comprehensive public university and a key national institution under the ''211 Project'' and ''Double First-Class'' initiative. Founded in 1958, it has grown into the largest and most prestigious university in Hainan Province, playing a vital role in regional development and tropical studies. The university excels in fields such as tropical agriculture, marine sciences, tourism management, and environmental engineering, leveraging its unique geographical advantages in China''s southernmost province. Notable programs include its College of Tropical Crops, which conducts cutting-edge research on rubber, coconut, and other tropical plants, and its School of Tourism, which benefits from Hainan''s status as a major international tourist destination. HNU''s campus in Haikou features modern facilities, lush greenery, and a vibrant student life with numerous clubs, cultural events, and sports activities. It attracts students from across China and internationally, offering a diverse academic environment focused on innovation and sustainability in tropical regions.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2026-01-17T07:54:09.341Z', '2026-01-30T21:36:44.691Z', 'China', '25000.00', '40000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20250611/1749654353_8859_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20250611/1749654449_4062_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241121/1732173986_4124_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241121/1732174118_6377_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241121/1732174208_3883_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241121/1732174089_6294_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241121/1732174096_2920_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'hainan-university', '2026-06-30', '[9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO universities (id, name_en, name_cn, short_name, logo_url, cover_image_url, province, city, address, website, type, category, ranking_national, ranking_international, founded_year, student_count, international_student_count, faculty_count, teaching_languages, scholarship_available, description, facilities, accommodation_info, contact_email, contact_phone, latitude, longitude, is_active, view_count, created_at, updated_at, country, tuition_min, tuition_max, tuition_currency, images, video_urls, meta_title, meta_description, meta_keywords, og_image, slug, application_deadline, intake_months, default_tuition_per_year, default_tuition_currency, use_default_tuition, scholarship_percentage, tuition_by_degree, scholarship_by_degree, tier, acceptance_flexibility, csca_required, has_application_fee, description_en, description_cn, facilities_en, facilities_cn, accommodation_info_en, accommodation_info_cn, address_en, address_cn) VALUES ('103380b1-03d0-4acd-b656-79c3f5802aba', 'Guizhou University', '贵州大学', NULL, NULL, '', 'Guizhou', 'Guiyang', 'Huaxi District, Guiyang, Guizhou Province, China', 'https://www.gzu.edu.cn', '211', NULL, 120, 1200, 1902, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, 'Guizhou University, founded in 1902, is a key comprehensive university under the ''211 Project'' in Guizhou Province. It has evolved through mergers, including with Guizhou University of Technology and Guizhou Agricultural College, strengthening its multidisciplinary approach. The university excels in fields such as agriculture, engineering, ethnology, and environmental science, leveraging Guizhou''s rich natural and cultural resources. Notable programs include botany, mining engineering, and minority languages, with strong research in karst geology and eco-environmental protection. The campus in Guiyang''s Huaxi District offers a vibrant student life, with modern facilities, cultural activities, and a focus on innovation and international collaboration, serving as a hub for talent development in Southwest China.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, 0, '2025-10-17T09:58:06.022Z', '2025-12-22T19:15:01.911Z', 'China', '25000.00', '40000.00', 'CNY', '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'guizhou-university', '2026-05-30', '[]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U2', 'Medium', false, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It has evolved from a technical institute into a comprehensive university offering programs in engineering, management, economics, arts, and sciences. HDU is renowned for its strengths in electronic information engineering, computer science, automation, and communication engineering, with close ties to the tech industry in Hangzhou, a hub for innovation. The university emphasizes practical skills and research, hosting state-level labs and collaborating with companies like Alibaba and Huawei. Campus life is vibrant, with modern facilities, student clubs, and cultural activities, fostering a dynamic environment for over 20,000 students. It was designated a Double First-Class university by the Chinese government, highlighting its excellence in disciplines like meteorology, oceanography, and environmental science. Key strengths include its state key laboratory in atmospheric sciences, strong programs in computer science, electronics, and management, and collaborations with the China Meteorological Administration. The university offers a vibrant campus life with modern facilities, international student exchanges, and research opportunities, attracting students globally. As a pioneer in China''s higher education reform, it emphasizes innovation, interdisciplinary research, and international collaboration. SUSTech is designated as a Double First-Class university, focusing on science, engineering, and medicine, with strengths in materials science, computer science, and biomedical engineering. The university features a modern campus with state-of-the-art facilities, a low student-to-faculty ratio, and a curriculum that integrates liberal arts with STEM education. It attracts top students and faculty globally, offering numerous research opportunities and partnerships with industries in the Shenzhen area, known as China''s Silicon Valley. Campus life is vibrant, with diverse student organizations, cultural events, and a strong emphasis on entrepreneurship and sustainability.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2026-02-28T13:08:44.328Z', '2026-02-28T13:15:59.068Z', 'China', '28000.00', '42000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241126/1732605307_1849_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241126/1732605307_9696_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241126/1732605307_1176_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241126/1732605324_4771_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241126/1732605334_3480_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'southern-university-of-science-and-technology', '2026-04-30', '[9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It is a key national university under the ''211 Project,'' specializing in economics, law, and management. ZUEL offers a wide range of undergraduate, master''s, and doctoral programs, with strengths in disciplines such as Applied Economics, Law, Business Administration, and Theoretical Economics. The university is renowned for its research in finance, taxation, and civil law, contributing significantly to policy-making in China. Campus life is vibrant, with numerous student clubs, international exchange programs, and modern facilities, including a large library and sports complexes. Located in Wuhan, a major educational hub, ZUEL attracts students from across the country and abroad, fostering a diverse and dynamic academic environment.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-10-06T16:29:18.532Z', '2026-01-30T21:51:34.593Z', 'China', '25000.00', '40000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241119/1731997333_3693_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201910/1554877594_7187_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241119/1731997525_3842_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241119/1731997549_2526_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241119/1731997650_7231_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/20241119/1731997668_3027_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'zhongnan-university-of-economics-and-law', '2026-05-30', '[]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U2', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It is renowned for its comprehensive medical education, research, and clinical services, particularly in areas like tropical medicine, public health, and ethnic medicine, leveraging its location in Yunnan''s diverse region. KMMU operates multiple affiliated hospitals, providing extensive clinical training and healthcare services. The campus in Kunming''s Chenggong District features modern facilities, libraries, and research centers, fostering a vibrant academic environment with student organizations and cultural activities. As a hub for medical innovation in Yunnan, it collaborates internationally and contributes significantly to regional health development.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2026-01-14T10:37:35.504Z', '2026-01-30T21:41:32.443Z', 'China', '18000.00', '32000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559812176_9279_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559812176_1880_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559812176_4634_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559812176_5063_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'kunming-medical-university', '2026-01-20', '[3,9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

As a member of China''s elite C9 League and holding 985, 211, and Double First-Class status, HIT is a key national institution with a global reputation. The university excels in fields such as aerospace engineering, mechanical engineering, computer science, materials science, and robotics, contributing significantly to China''s space and defense programs. Its main campus in Harbin features a blend of historic and modern architecture, with additional campuses in Weihai and Shenzhen expanding its reach. HIT fosters a rigorous academic environment, attracting top students and faculty, and offers vibrant campus life with numerous student organizations, research opportunities, and international collaborations. Originally established as Xi’an Institute of Technology, it has evolved into a comprehensive institution offering programs in engineering, science, management, arts, and economics. It hosts several provincial key laboratories and engineering research centers, fostering innovation and industry collaboration. XATU''s campus in Xi’an, a historic city in northwest China, provides a vibrant academic environment with modern facilities, student clubs, and cultural activities, attracting over 20,000 students. The university emphasizes practical skills and entrepreneurship, contributing to regional development and producing graduates well-prepared for careers in technology and engineering sectors.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2026-03-02T15:04:40.069Z', '2026-03-02T15:09:07.536Z', 'China', '18000.00', '28000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559825929_5265_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202119/1618815598_6866_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559825929_5925_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559825929_7730_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559825929_7691_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'xian-technological-university', '2026-05-30', '[9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', false, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

Located in Shenyang, a major industrial hub in Northeast China, the university emphasizes practical skills and industry collaboration. Its strengths lie in civil engineering, architecture, urban planning, environmental engineering, and construction management, with programs designed to meet regional development needs. Chang''an University emphasizes practical training and industry collaboration, preparing graduates for careers in engineering, technology, and management. SWUPL excels in law, offering strong programs in civil law, criminal law, and international law, with additional strengths in economics, management, and journalism. SWUPL has produced numerous prominent legal professionals, judges, and scholars, contributing significantly to China''s legal system. It originated as Hubei Provincial Enshi Normal School and evolved through several name changes before adopting its current name in 2018. The university excels in disciplines such as ethnology, Chinese language and literature, and agriculture, offering a range of undergraduate, master''s, and doctoral programs. It is known for its research in Tujia and Miao cultures, contributing to the preservation and study of ethnic traditions in China. Campus life is vibrant, with modern facilities, student clubs, and cultural events that foster a diverse and inclusive environment. The university has evolved into a comprehensive institution with strengths in engineering, science, and management. It offers a wide range of undergraduate, master''s, and doctoral programs, with notable disciplines in materials science, civil engineering, environmental engineering, and mechanical engineering. SWUST is known for its strong industry connections, particularly in areas like nuclear technology and disaster prevention, leveraging Mianyang''s status as a hub for scientific research. Emphasizing innovation and practical skills, SWUST collaborates with enterprises and research institutes to provide students with hands-on experience, preparing them for careers in technology and beyond. Campus life is vibrant, with modern facilities, student clubs, and cultural activities, set in the mountainous and riverside landscape of Chongqing, providing a dynamic environment for over 30,000 students. CQJTU emphasizes industry collaboration, international exchanges, and sustainable development, preparing graduates for careers in transportation and beyond.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-10-11T20:08:49.559Z', '2026-01-30T21:34:51.105Z', 'China', '18000.00', '35000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546613_9123_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546614_6138_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546614_4919_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546613_1600_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546613_1674_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546613_5776_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546613_5671_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546613_1447_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201914/1552546613_7946_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'chongqing-jiaotong-university', '2026-02-12', '[]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It has evolved from a teacher training college into a multidisciplinary institution with a strong emphasis on education, arts, and sciences. The university is renowned for its teacher education programs, which have produced many distinguished educators and scholars. Key strengths include disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Education, Fine Arts, and Music, with notable programs in Primary Education and Art Design. HZNU actively engages in research, with several provincial-level key laboratories and research centers focusing on areas like educational technology and cultural studies. The campus features modern facilities, including libraries, sports complexes, and student dormitories, set in a picturesque environment near West Lake. Student life is vibrant, with numerous clubs, cultural events, and international exchange opportunities, fostering a dynamic academic community. The university collaborates with institutions worldwide, enhancing its global outlook and providing students with diverse learning experiences.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-12-17T17:36:15.457Z', '2026-01-30T21:37:06.545Z', 'China', '18000.00', '32000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201908/1559987292_9090_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201910/1560097018_8895_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201908/1559987292_3124_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201908/1559987292_9686_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'hangzhou-normal-university', '2026-05-30', '[9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO universities (id, name_en, name_cn, short_name, logo_url, cover_image_url, province, city, address, website, type, category, ranking_national, ranking_international, founded_year, student_count, international_student_count, faculty_count, teaching_languages, scholarship_available, description, facilities, accommodation_info, contact_email, contact_phone, latitude, longitude, is_active, view_count, created_at, updated_at, country, tuition_min, tuition_max, tuition_currency, images, video_urls, meta_title, meta_description, meta_keywords, og_image, slug, application_deadline, intake_months, default_tuition_per_year, default_tuition_currency, use_default_tuition, scholarship_percentage, tuition_by_degree, scholarship_by_degree, tier, acceptance_flexibility, csca_required, has_application_fee, description_en, description_cn, facilities_en, facilities_cn, accommodation_info_en, accommodation_info_cn, address_en, address_cn) VALUES ('cbfe823f-2c42-4972-86ad-c5b9e06cc708', 'Huazhong Agricultural University', '华中农业大学', NULL, NULL, '', 'Hubei', 'Wuhan', 'No. 1 Shizishan Street, Hongshan District, Wuhan, Hubei Province, China', 'https://www.hzau.edu.cn', '211', NULL, 85, 801, 1898, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, 'Huazhong Agricultural University (HZAU), founded in 1898 as Hubei Agricultural School, is a key national university under the Ministry of Education and a member of the 211 Project. Located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, it is renowned for its strengths in agricultural sciences, life sciences, and engineering. The university excels in disciplines such as crop science, animal husbandry, veterinary medicine, biotechnology, and food science, with several programs ranked among the top in China. It hosts state key laboratories and engineering research centers, contributing significantly to agricultural innovation and rural development. HZAU''s campus, known as the ''Garden University,'' features lush greenery and modern facilities, fostering a vibrant academic environment. The university emphasizes research, international collaboration, and practical training, with partnerships worldwide. Student life includes diverse clubs, cultural activities, and sports, supported by a strong sense of community. It has evolved from its origins as Nantong Medical School and Nantong Textile School into a multi-disciplinary institution offering programs in medicine, engineering, arts, sciences, economics, management, law, and education. NTU is renowned for its strengths in clinical medicine, textile engineering, and marine sciences, with key programs including Clinical Medicine, Textile Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. The university emphasizes practical education and research, collaborating with industries and international partners to enhance student outcomes. Campus life is vibrant, featuring modern facilities, student clubs, cultural events, and sports activities, fostering a holistic development environment. NTU contributes significantly to regional development and has a growing reputation in China''s higher education landscape.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-10-04T12:41:16.623Z', '2026-01-30T21:43:03.934Z', 'China', '18000.00', '32000.00', 'CNY', '["https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813425646.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813433362.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813432871.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/202509281343263.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813432356.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813432150.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813431853.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813431523.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813430960.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/202509281343077.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/202509281343038.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/202509281343006.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813425896.webp","https://studyinchina.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025092813425253.webp"]'::jsonb, '["https://youtu.be/p4EBjYc2O5Y"]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'nantong-university-e960c797', '2026-05-08', '[3,9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It specializes in engineering, with strong programs in food science, grain storage, mechanical engineering, civil engineering, and materials science, reflecting its historical focus on grain industry and technology. The university has expanded to include disciplines in management, economics, arts, and sciences, offering over 60 undergraduate programs and numerous master''s and doctoral degrees. HAUT is known for its research in grain processing and storage, contributing significantly to China''s food security. The campus features modern facilities, including laboratories, libraries, and sports complexes, fostering a vibrant student life with various clubs and cultural activities. It collaborates with international institutions and industries, enhancing its global outreach and practical education. With a commitment to innovation and applied research, HAUT aims to cultivate skilled professionals for regional and national development.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-12-21T07:43:31.498Z', '2026-01-30T21:38:17.732Z', 'China', '18000.00', '32000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1552300743_4499_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1552300743_4586_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1552300743_4911_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1552300743_5092_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/1552300743_9021_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'henan-university-of-technology', '2026-01-20', '[3]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It focuses on medical education, research, and healthcare services, with strengths in clinical medicine, traditional Chinese medicine, and public health. Notable programs include its Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) for international students, as well as master''s and doctoral programs in disciplines like stomatology and nursing. The university operates several affiliated hospitals, providing practical training and serving the local community. Campus life features modern facilities, student organizations, and cultural activities, reflecting the region''s ethnic diversity. NXMU plays a vital role in addressing healthcare needs in Ningxia and contributes to medical advancements through research in areas such as endemic diseases and minority health.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2026-01-13T09:59:08.772Z', '2026-02-09T09:23:00.590Z', 'China', '18000.00', '28000.00', 'CNY', '["https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559811872_2642_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559811935_7423_thumb.jpg","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/202119/1618823623_3028_thumb.png","https://static-data.gaokao.cn/upload/school/201906/1559812044_5696_thumb.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'ningxia-medical-university', '2026-05-30', '[9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U3', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

As a ''211 Project'' institution, it excels in medicine, economics, management, and liberal arts, with strong programs in Chinese language and culture for international students. The university is renowned for its multicultural environment, hosting over 10,000 overseas students from more than 100 countries. It operates multiple campuses in Guangzhou, Shenzhen, and Zhuhai, offering state-of-the-art facilities, vibrant student life, and extensive research opportunities. Jinan University emphasizes innovation and global engagement, contributing significantly to China''s higher education and cultural exchange.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, 0, '2025-10-15T09:52:23.973Z', '2026-01-30T21:41:03.838Z', 'China', '25000.00', '40000.00', 'CNY', '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'jinan-university', '', '[]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U2', 'Medium', true, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

Located in Shenzhen, a hub for technology and entrepreneurship, SIGS focuses on interdisciplinary research and education in fields such as artificial intelligence, data science, environmental engineering, and advanced manufacturing. The school offers master''s and doctoral programs, emphasizing international collaboration with partnerships from top universities worldwide. Students benefit from state-of-the-art facilities, including labs and innovation centers, and a vibrant campus life that integrates academic rigor with industry engagement. SIGS aims to cultivate leaders who can address global challenges through cutting-edge research and practical applications, supported by Tsinghua''s renowned faculty and Shenzhen''s dynamic ecosystem.', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, true, 0, '2025-10-21T06:42:42.097Z', '2026-01-30T21:48:19.926Z', 'China', '30000.00', '45000.00', 'CNY', '["https://www.sigs.tsinghua.edu.cn/_upload/article/images/eb/1b/79ce7d814679a7abfac71cd5bf8d/a49f091a-780f-40a0-9a2e-b7454e067555.jpg","https://www.sigs.tsinghua.edu.cn/_upload/article/images/54/30/3e0d7b31413595bf74875bb5a1d5/1b91c4dc-6c21-4267-a3d2-6121a38b9806.jpg","https://www.sigs.tsinghua.edu.cn/_upload/article/images/3e/e6/9478b095439eb0621bc8d3f07300/90a96a25-187f-45c0-8b40-6cf8032bf2ac.jpg","https://www.sigs.tsinghua.edu.cn/_upload/article/images/29/cc/1e18b9294e53b579f3e8d106b54a/bee9e64b-aeea-4e0a-be68-9114c8273188.jpg","https://www.sigs.tsinghua.edu.cn/_upload/article/images/a2/f5/094a9f9b440d8b12ee67a5b84991/c8d3469b-7f5d-4ab4-b5fd-4aa9677496fd.jpg","https://www.sigs.tsinghua.edu.cn/_upload/article/images/fb/7b/adaebaec4238bb19e7f6526c3106/9b76464b-da72-4ea8-8de6-37365481e6c8.jpg","https://www.sigs.tsinghua.edu.cn/_upload/article/images/f4/aa/5b9a1172485da206eab563be822e/fa311fa5-51ee-45d0-9294-18050fdd58fa.jpg"]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, '', '', '["[]"]'::jsonb, '', 'tsinghua-shenzhen-international-graduate-school', '2026-01-30', '[9]'::jsonb, NULL, 'CNY', false, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, 'U2', 'Medium', false, false, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

It focuses on teacher education, liberal arts, and sciences, with strengths in education, Chinese language and literature, and primary education. The university offers undergraduate and graduate programs, emphasizing practical skills and moral development for educators. Notable programs include its teacher training initiatives and collaborations with local schools. Campus life is vibrant, featuring modern facilities, student clubs, cultural events, and a supportive environment that fosters academic and personal growth.
